name: k6-performance-testing-framework
description: Production-ready K6 performance testing boilerplate framework adhering strictly to Grafana best practices

scripts.test:fixed:staging: cross-env K6_ENV=staging K6_PROFILE=fixed k6 run tests/nova-user-test.js
scripts.test:fixed:prod: cross-env K6_ENV=production K6_PROFILE=fixed k6 run tests/nova-user-test.js
scripts.test:rampup:staging: cross-env K6_ENV=staging K6_PROFILE=ramp-up k6 run tests/nova-user-test.js
scripts.test:rampup:prod: cross-env K6_ENV=production K6_PROFILE=ramp-up k6 run tests/nova-user-test.js
scripts.test:spike:staging: cross-env K6_ENV=staging K6_PROFILE=spike k6 run tests/nova-user-test.js
scripts.test:spike:prod: cross-env K6_ENV=production K6_PROFILE=spike k6 run tests/nova-user-test.js

author: Expert Performance Engineer
